title: Auto-clear all form fields on page load for fresh data entry

requirements.text: Reset all form fields to blank/empty defaults automatically when each form/modal mounts, so no pre-populated values appear on page load or when opening a form for new entry. This applies to all forms across the application including: Create Purchase Order (PurchaseOrderFormModal), Record Sale (RecordSaleModal), Add/Edit Supplier (SupplierFormModal), Add/Edit Staff (StaffFormModal), Add/Edit Customer (RegisterCustomerModal), Add Expense, and Shift Form (ShiftFormModal). Saved records in the database must not be deleted — only the form input fields are reset.

quotes: Clear all form fields (resetting all inputs to blank) so the form is ready for fresh data entry
This will happen automatically when the page loads, with no pre-populated values
No saved/stored records will be deleted — only the form inputs will be reset

acceptanceCriteria: Opening PurchaseOrderFormModal for a new entry shows all fields blank with no pre-populated date, supplier, fuel type, invoice number, or quantity values.
Opening RecordSaleModal shows all fields blank with no pre-populated fuel type, quantity, payment method, pump number, or staff values.
Opening SupplierFormModal for a new supplier shows all fields blank.
Opening StaffFormModal for a new staff member shows all fields blank including hire date and salary.
Opening RegisterCustomerModal for a new customer shows all fields blank.
Opening ShiftFormModal shows all fields blank including date, start/end time, and pump number.
Expense entry form opens with all fields blank.
Existing saved records in the store and database are unaffected after forms are reset.
Edit forms (when opened for an existing record) still correctly populate with that record's data — only 'new entry' forms open blank.

constraints: Do not delete or modify any saved records in the backend or Zustand store — only reset form input state.
Edit/update forms opened for an existing record must still pre-populate with that record's current values.
nonGoals: Adding a manual 'Clear' or 'Reset' button — clearing is automatic on mount only.
Clearing or resetting data in the backend canister.
Modifying the dashboard, reports, or read-only display pages.
